task: Lifts the disclosed platform ceiling from the previous entry: 'then lets support as many holders as many authored by builder.' Approved via Plan Mode as a genuine architecture change. World Builder v2's convergeScene() now compiles an additive placeRects array (id/name/position/size/shape/padding/fit/frame per authored Place) alongside the existing holders count; absent on every pre-existing theme and on tools/world-builder (v1). renderer/slideRenderer.js's _resolveBorder/_cardArtworkOverride/_resolveArtworkFields/_drawImage all gained an optional trailing placeId parameter -- omitted, byte-identical to before; a real id resolves that Place's own storage (slide.metadata.placeContent[id], slide._placeImages[id]) via its own selection id ('image-holder' for Place 1, 'image-place-N' for the rest), deliberately distinct from the Place's own compiled Builder id. A real correctness bug was caught and fixed via pixel-sampling during verification: Place 1 must be subdivided by its own authored fraction once 2+ Places exist (matching every other Place), not stay at the full panel rect unconditionally -- the naive reading would have made Place 1 draw across the whole panel, overlapping Place 2+ entirely. getPlaceRects(s) (consumed by Object Strip, hit-testing, and pixel verification) mirrors render()'s own conditional exactly. js/app.js's hit-testing/pan gesture, js/pageRuntime.js's selectionIsValid, js/objectStrip.js's card list, and js/contextPanel.js/js/cardDesigner.js's image editing controls all thread the selected Place's id through. WYSIWYE holds for free since every export surface resolves through the same buildPayload+render() pair. Scope deliberately bounded and disclosed: v2-only, Card Designer's Frame Look/Style controls stay Place-1-only, only Place 1 gets composition-aware caption placement and Layer Pack rendering. Verified via a new Playwright test building a real Dual Holder Scene with two distinct Frame Variations, importing the compiled package into real Studio, and confirming both Places render at pixel-distinct non-overlapping rects with distinct picture AND frame colours, independent Object Strip selection, isolated Fit-mode edits, a full serialize/deserialize round trip, page duplication, and zero behaviour change for the theme's other single-Place Scene. Full regression across the entire existing Creator/Builder/Card-Platform Playwright suite (23 scripts) and both goldenBuild.js suites passes unchanged, zero console errors. See CLAUDE.md's matching entry for the full account.
